{{Quote|The folks at Lucasfilm and ''Star Wars Galaxy'' wanted to explore the Fett phenomenon, so we've given the hunter his own bountiful one-shot special. It's got everything you ever wanted to know about Boba Fett—but were afraid (and rightfully so!) to ask.|Chip Lovitt, Managing Editor|<ref name="Star Wars: Boba Fett">''[[Star Wars: Boba Fett]]''</ref>}}
'''''Star Wars: Boba Fett''''' is a one-shot magazine published in [[1998]] by [[Topps]] and produced by the editors of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Collector]]''. The magazine focuses on the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], exploring the character's popularity in the ''[[Star Wars]]'' fan culture.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"[[Boba Fett Lives! Meet the Man Behind the Mask]]" by [[Chip Lovitt]]
*"[[Just Who Is Boba Fett?]]" - Everything you need to know about the most notorious bounty hunter in the galaxy," by [[Andy Mangels]]
*"[[Meet Jeremy Bulloch: The Man Behind the Mask]]," by [[David West Reynold]]
*"[[The Bounty Hunter's Comic Book Career]]," by [[Daniel Wallace]]
*"[[Fans' Fett-ish - Boba Fett has legions of loyal devotees]]," by [[Josh Izzo]]
*"[[The Boba Fett Art Gallery]]," art by: [[John Van Fleet]], [[Mark Harrison]], [[Dave Dorman]], [[Ken Steacy]], [[Joe Smith]], [[Brian Stelfreeze]], [[Cam Kennedy]], [[Greg Hildebrandt|Greg]] and [[Tim Hildebrandt]], and [[Christopher Moeller]]
*"[[Larger Than Life: Sinister Boba Fett Is the Latest Display Figure from Don Post Studios]]," by [[Gary Gerani]]
*"[[Collectibles & Toys: Beware! A Boba Fett-ish Grips Toyland]]," by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]]
*"[[Boba Fett Price List: A Collector's Bounty]]," by [[Josh Ling]]
*"[[The Special Return of Boba Fett]]," by [[Mark Cotta Vaz]]
*"[[Boba's the Name, Bounty Hunting's His Game: Fett finds a home in computer and video games]]," by [[Tom Byron]]
*"Boba Fett Trivia Test"
*Double-sided Poster:
**"[[Slave I - Technical Commentary]]," by [[David West Reynolds (real person)|David West Reynolds]], art by [[Richard Chasemore]]
**"[[Boba Fett's Armor: An Essential Guide to a Walking Weapon]]," by [[Bill Smith]]
